title: Industry Analyst Relations Manager
description:
**Required Travel** :Minimal   
**Managerial - Yes**   
**Location:** :Israel- RAANANA (Amdocs Site)

**Who are we?**
---------------

Amdocs helps the world’s leading communications and media companies deliver exceptional customer experiences through reliable, efficient, and secure operations at scale. We provide software products and services that embed intelligence into how work runs across business, IT, and network domains –delivering measurable outcomes in customer experience, network performance, cloud modernization, and revenue growth. With our talented people, and more than forty years of experience running mission-critical systems around the globe, Amdocs runs billions of transactions daily. Our technology is relied on every day, connecting people worldwide and advancing a more inclusive, connected world. Together, we help those who shape the future to make it amazing. Amdocs is listed on the NASDAQ Global Select Market (NASDAQ: DOX) and reported revenue of $4.53 billion in fiscal 2025. For more information, visit [www.amdocs.com](http://www.amdocs.com)

At Amdocs, our mission is to empower our employees to 'Live Amazing, Do Amazing' every day. We believe in creating a workplace where you not only excel professionally but also thrive personally. Through our culture of making a real impact, fostering growth, embracing flexibility, and building connections, we enable them to live meaningful lives while making a difference in the world.

**In one sentence**
-------------------

Amdocs is seeking an **Industry Analyst Relations Manager** to join its highly experienced and dedicated Industry Analyst Relations team, playing a lead role in the planning, execution, management and measurement of our global AR programs.

As part of our friendly, united AR team within Corporate Marketing, you will build on our relationships with Amdocs’ established and developing network of global and specialist analyst firms, helping to grow awareness and advocacy for Amdocs’.

**What will your job look like?**
---------------------------------

We are seeking a bright, dynamic achiever who enjoys working both autonomously and in close partnership with AR colleagues and many other stakeholders across the business.

This diverse role involves an interesting blend of strategic and tactical activities, driving inventive AR initiatives to raise awareness and optimize positioning of Amdocs’ capabilities within the analyst influencer community, as well as bringing the value of analyst insights into the business.

* Manage all elements of proactive AR programs, moving through the relationship cycle from Analyst Discovery and Evaluation, Engagement, Development, & Advocacy Building
* Key report and RFI submissions – evaluating new coverage opportunities as well as managing Amdocs’ participation and inclusion in market and competitive landscape reports.
* Plan and fulfill all aspects of analyst engagement at industry events as well as Amdocs’ own hosted analyst days, summits and roadshows.
* Co-ordinate the right cadence of ongoing dialogue with key core analysts through regular touch points such as briefings and inquiry calls and driving opportunities for consensus building.
* Bring analyst feedback, insights, viewpoints and advice to our internal stakeholders to support strategy and validate thinking.
* Engage in cross team collaboration that brings the best of Amdocs to our storytelling.
* Provide guidance to internal stakeholders on paid-for analyst engagements such as custom research projects, strategy days, speaking engagements, webinars, etc
* Deliver effective, timely internal and external communications focused on audience value.

**All you need is...**
----------------------

* 5+ years in the Industry Analyst Relations role or related B2B relationship management experience
* You are a strong team contributor and collaborator, able to effectively operate in a multi-national and cross functional environment
* You can also work independently and are self-motivated and flexible, adapting to changing priorities whilst staying focused on core goals
* You love to take the initiative, using your energy, enthusiasm and creativity to navigate complexity and find new ways to bring the value of Analyst Relations to the business
* You are a strategic thinker with tactical execution skills; a flexible multi-tasker balancing long term relationship management with shorter term program deliverables
* You have a grasp of new technologies and approaches and their business impact
* You have experience of Gartner and other major analyst RFI and report submission processes
* You are an ambassador and diplomat with the communication skills to broker successful working relationships with internal clients and external influencers, engendering goodwill and trust
* You enjoy ‘attention to detail’ oriented work while keeping an eye on the bigger picture for management level summation
* While not essential, knowledge of the telecoms IT space (and existing analyst relationships within) would be an advantage
* Proficiency in maximizing the use of AI tools
* You must be fluent in English
* You do not need a specific academic background as long as you have a record of relevant and demonstrable relationship management skills in a B2B technology environment.

**Why you will love this job:**
-------------------------------

* Build valuable customer relationships. Showcase your consulting acuity to relevant partners including input and assistance with planning; for example, leading PR plans, social media initiatives, etc.
* Gain team building abilities across all boundaries and demonstrate your project management skills and industry insights.
* You will have the opportunity to work in a growing organization, with ever growing opportunities for personal growth and one of the highest scores of employee engagement in Amdocs.
* We are a dynamic, multi-cultural organization that constantly innovates and empowers our employees to grow. Our people our passionate, daring, and phenomenal teammates that stand by each other with a dedication to creating a diverse, inclusive workplace!
* We offer a wide range of stellar benefits including health, dental, vision, and life insurance as well as paid time off, sick time, and parental leave!

**[Amdocs is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce](https://www.amdocs.com/sites/default/files/Amdocs-Nondiscrimination-Statement.pdf)**

title: Operational Excellence Lead- Agentic Way of Working
description:
**Job ID:** 205380   
**Required Travel** :Up to 25%   
**Managerial - Yes**  
**Location: Israel- RAANANA (Amdocs Site)**

**Who are we?**
---------------

Amdocs helps those who build the future to make it amazing. With our market-leading portfolio of software products and services, we unlock our customers’ innovative potential, empowering them to provide next-generation communication and media experiences for both the individual end user and enterprise customers. Our employees around the globe are here to accelerate service providers’ migration to the cloud, enable them to differentiate in the 5G era, and digitalize and automate their operations. Listed on the NASDAQ Global Select Market, Amdocs had revenue of $5.00 billion in fiscal 2024. For more information, visit [www.amdocs.com](http://www.amdocs.com)

At Amdocs, our mission is to empower our employees to 'Live Amazing, Do Amazing' every day. We believe in creating a workplace where you not only excel professionally but also thrive personally. Through our culture of making a real impact, fostering growth, embracing flexibility, and building connections, we enable them to live meaningful lives while making a difference in the world.

**In one sentence**
-------------------

Own and lead the Agentic Way of Working (WoW) methodology across Amdocs, ensuring it is continuously evolved, standardized, and scaled based on pilot feedback, industry trends, and organizational needs.

**What will your job look like?**
---------------------------------

•         Own the end-to-end Agentic WoW methodology, including principles, practices, and core artifacts

**All you need is...**
----------------------

•         Proven experience leading enterprise-level operational or methodology transformations  
•         Strong background in Operational Excellence, Agile, or Ways of Working frameworks  
•         Demonstrated ability to operate in ambiguous and evolving domains  
•         Experience working with communities of practice or coaching networks  
•         Strong influencing skills in a matrix, global environment

**Why you will love this job:**
-------------------------------

You will play a key role in shaping a next-generation operating model that directly impacts how Amdocs delivers value at scale.

**[Amdocs is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce](https://www.amdocs.com/sites/default/files/Amdocs-Nondiscrimination-Statement.pdf)**

title: Procurement Category Manager
description:
**Required Travel** :Up to 25%   
**Managerial - Yes**   
**Location:** :Israel- RAANANA (Amdocs Site)

**Who are we?**
---------------

Amdocs helps the world’s leading communications and media companies deliver exceptional customer experiences through reliable, efficient, and secure operations at scale. We provide software products and services that embed intelligence into how work runs across business, IT, and network domains –delivering measurable outcomes in customer experience, network performance, cloud modernization, and revenue growth. With our talented people, and more than forty years of experience running mission-critical systems around the globe, Amdocs runs billions of transactions daily. Our technology is relied on every day, connecting people worldwide and advancing a more inclusive, connected world. Together, we help those who shape the future to make it amazing. Amdocs is listed on the NASDAQ Global Select Market (NASDAQ: DOX) and reported revenue of $4.53 billion in fiscal 2025. For more information, visit [www.amdocs.com](http://www.amdocs.com)

**In one sentence**
-------------------

Lead global end to end procurement strategy and execution across all technology and indirect categories, serving as the accountable owner of the procurement stream for M&A activities—from due diligence through post merger integration—to deliver business value, risk mitigation, and operational excellence.

**What will your job look like?**
---------------------------------

•    Own and lead global procurement activities across all categories including hardware, software, cloud, professional services, marketing, and indirect spend within a technology-driven environment.

**All you need is...**
----------------------

•    7+ years of proven experience in global procurement within a technology or enterprise-services organization.  
•    Hands-on expertise across all procurement categories, including technology (hardware, software, cloud), services, marketing, and indirect procurement.  
•    Demonstrated managerial and leadership experience, including team management and stakeholder influence at senior levels.  
•    Strong project management skills, with experience leading complex, cross-functional, and multi-geo initiatives.  
•    Proven experience supporting M&A activities, from procurement due diligence through post-merger integration.  
•    Deep knowledge of sourcing, negotiations, contract management, and supplier governance.  
•    Strong commercial, analytical, and decision-making capabilities.  
•    Bachelor’s degree in Business, Economics, Engineering, Law, Supply Chain, or a related field (advanced degree or certifications are an advantage).  
•    Fluent English (spoken and written); additional languages are an advantage.

**Why you will love this job:**
-------------------------------

•    You will operate at the strategic core of Amdocs, influencing major business decisions and transformation initiatives.  
•    You will lead high-impact, complex programs, including M&A and global sourcing initiatives with executive visibility.  
•    You will work in a diverse, global, and dynamic environment, collaborating with senior stakeholders across regions.  
•    You will have the opportunity to shape and evolve procurement strategy, processes, and talent within a leading technology company.  
•    You will be empowered to drive measurable value, innovation, and continuous improvement at scale.

**[Amdocs is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce](https://www.amdocs.com/sites/default/files/Amdocs-Nondiscrimination-Statement.pdf)**

description:

**Who are we?**
---------------

Amdocs helps the world’s leading communications and media companies deliver exceptional customer experiences through reliable, efficient, and secure operations at scale. We provide software products and services that embed intelligence into how work runs across business, IT, and network domains –delivering measurable outcomes in customer experience, network performance, cloud modernization, and revenue growth. With our talented people, and more than forty years of experience running mission-critical systems around the globe, Amdocs runs billions of transactions daily. Our technology is relied on every day, connecting people worldwide and advancing a more inclusive, connected world. Together, we help those who shape the future to make it amazing. Amdocs is listed on the NASDAQ Global Select Market (NASDAQ: DOX) and reported revenue of $4.53 billion in fiscal 2025. For more information, visit [www.amdocs.com](http://www.amdocs.com)

At Amdocs, our mission is to empower our employees to 'Live Amazing, Do Amazing' every day. We believe in creating a workplace where you not only excel professionally but also thrive personally. Through our culture of making a real impact, fostering growth, embracing flexibility, and building connections, we enable them to live meaningful lives while making a difference in the world.

**In one sentence**
-------------------

This is a senior and highly accountable position, with end-to-end ownership of the Company’s external financial statements processes and close collaboration with senior Finance leadership and key stakeholders, while maintaining a strong focus on accuracy, compliance and operational excellence.

**What will your job look like?**
---------------------------------

* Leading the preparation of quarterly and annual financial statements submitted to the SEC
* Ensuring compliance with US GAAP and SEC disclosure requirements
* Working closely with Corporate Legal and other corporate units, and presenting to senior Finance management
* Partnering with external auditors throughout the audit and approval processes

**All you need is...**
----------------------

* Bachelor’s degree holder
* 4-8 years’ experience in one of the "Big 4" Accounting Firms , or
* 2-4 years’ experience in one of the "Big 4" Accounting Firms and 2-4 years’ experience as a Controller/Assistant Controller in a global-wide high-tech company
* Strong accounting and analytical skills.
* Must be a Certified Public Accountant
* Advanced ERP experience (Oracle advantage)
* Extensive knowledge in the areas of regulatory compliance and GAAP accounting standards, including 404 SOX requirements
* Strong accounting orientation
* Very good communication skills
* High level of precision, diligence, and attention to detail
* Strong accountability and ability to work under pressure and tight deadlines
* Knowledge and experience in US GAAP and SEC regulations is an advantage
* Proven managerial experience, with the ability to build and develop a team

**Why you will love this job:**
-------------------------------

* Work with dynamic Finance and Accounting professionals
* Grow and develop the Accounting Team
* Apply learned skills to improve the accounting processes

**[Amdocs is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce](https://www.amdocs.com/sites/default/files/Amdocs-Nondiscrimination-Statement.pdf)**

title: Solution Sales Lead- AI Division
description:
**Required Travel** :Minimal   
**Managerial - Yes**   
**Location:** :Israel- RAANANA (Amdocs Site)

**Who are we?**
---------------

At Amdocs, we foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and inclusivity. We believe in empowering our employees to drive change and make a meaningful impact. Our diverse and dynamic team is dedicated to pushing the boundaries of technology and delivering exceptional AI solutions to our customers. The Amdocs' amAIz Suite AI & Data Platform is a state-of-the-art solution designed to optimize telecom operations through advanced AI and data integration. Join us to be part of a forward-thinking organization where your ideas and contributions are valued and celebrated. Shape the future of telecommunications with us!

**In one sentence**
-------------------

As a Solution Sales Expert, you will be responsible for driving revenue growth by positioning Amdocs AI solutions to strategic customers. You will act as a trusted advisor, understanding client needs and aligning them with our AI portfolio to deliver measurable business outcomes.

**What will your job look like?**
---------------------------------

* Sales Strategy & Execution:
* Develop and execute sales plans for AI solutions across targeted accounts.
* Identify new business opportunities and drive end-to-end sales cycles.
* Solution Expertise:
* Articulate the value proposition of Amdocs AI offerings, including Generative AI, predictive analytics, and automation solutions.
* Collaborate with product and delivery teams to tailor solutions to customer requirements.
* Customer Engagement:
* Build strong relationships with C-level executives and decision-makers.
* Conduct workshops, demos, and presentations showcasing AI capabilities.
* Market Intelligence:
* Stay updated on AI trends, competitive landscape, and emerging technologies.
* Provide feedback to product teams for continuous improvement.

**All you need is...**
----------------------

* Experience:
* 8+ years in solution sales, with at least 3 years in AI/ML or advanced analytics solutions.
* Proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets in enterprise environments.
* Skills:
* Strong consultative selling and negotiation skills.
* Deep understanding of AI technologies and their business applications.
* Excellent communication and presentation abilities.

**Education:**

* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Technology, or related field (MBA preferred).

**Why you will love this job:**
-------------------------------

* Be part of Amdocs’ AI innovation journey.
* Work with global clients and cutting-edge technologies.
* Competitive compensation and growth opportunities.

**[Amdocs is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce](https://www.amdocs.com/sites/default/files/Amdocs-Nondiscrimination-Statement.pdf)**

description:

**Managerial - Yes**   
**Location:** :Israel- RAANANA (Amdocs Site)

**Who are we?**
---------------

Amdocs helps those who build the future to make it amazing. With our market-leading portfolio of software products and services, we unlock our customers’ innovative potential, empowering them to provide next-generation communication and media experiences for both the individual end user and enterprise customers. Our employees around the globe are here to accelerate service providers’ migration to the cloud, enable them to differentiate in the 5G era, and digitalize and automate their operations. Listed on the NASDAQ Global Select Market, Amdocs had revenue of $5.00 billion in fiscal 2024. For more information, visit [www.amdocs.com](http://www.amdocs.com)

At Amdocs, our mission is to empower our employees to 'Live Amazing, Do Amazing' every day. We believe in creating a workplace where you not only excel professionally but also thrive personally. Through our culture of making a real impact, fostering growth, embracing flexibility, and building connections, we enable them to live meaningful lives while making a difference in the world.

**In one sentence**
-------------------

A leadership marketing position responsible for definition, development and execution of the go-to-market strategy and marketing plans for the advanced AI products, solutions and services.

**What will your job look like?**
---------------------------------

* You will oversee the preparation and execution of go-to-market strategies, models and marketing tools to support Amdocs' business globally.
* You will be accountable for ensuring a wide variety of product marketing activities across multiple AI solutions ensuring Amdocs is differentiated from others in the market.
* You will collaborate extensively with other key functions, including Product Management, Sales and Sales engineering to develop marketing strategies and collaterals. Provides sales cycle support.
* Serves as the focal point for analysts and press relations teams. Functions as the key spokesperson for analysts and media engagements in the relevant domain.
* You will represent Amdocs as a senior executive and “thought leader”, when needed at executive forums, customer meetings, and investor and industry events
* You will serve as SME and Excellence Focal Point for Amdocs AI solutions in alignment to recent market trends.

**All you need is...**
----------------------

* 6+ years of relevant experience in AI Product Marketing
* 3+ years of experience in AI Product Marketing Management
* In-depth experience developing marketing plans, including processes that encompass writing, developing, validating, producing, and distributing marketing materials
* Passion for AI and advanced technologies and the curiosity to independently learn and develop
* Proven track record in customer-facing activities, including senior positions
* Proven ability to work in a matrix organization with senior level personnel throughout the company
* Willingness and ability to travel as part of the role

**Why you will love this job:**
-------------------------------

* You will be responsible for directing and managing AI-related Product Marketing activities, constantly updated with market trends and latest innovations
* An impactful role within a central business unit at a market-leading company on a global scale
* Enjoy a great work atmosphere with a team of marketing professionals and AI leaders

title: FinOps Team Lead
description:
**Job ID:** 207278   
**Required Travel** :Up to 25%   
**Managerial - No**  
**Location: Israel- RAANANA (Amdocs Site)**

**Who are we?**
---------------

Amdocs helps those who build the future to make it amazing. With our market-leading portfolio of software products and services, we unlock our customers’ innovative potential, empowering them to provide next-generation communication and media experiences for both the individual end user and enterprise customers. Our employees around the globe are here to accelerate service providers’ migration to the cloud, enable them to differentiate in the 5G era, and digitalize and automate their operations. Listed on the NASDAQ Global Select Market, Amdocs had revenue of $5.00 billion in fiscal 2024. For more information, visit [www.amdocs.com](http://www.amdocs.com)

At Amdocs, our mission is to empower our employees to 'Live Amazing, Do Amazing' every day. We believe in creating a workplace where you not only excel professionally but also thrive personally. Through our culture of making a real impact, fostering growth, embracing flexibility, and building connections, we enable them to live meaningful lives while making a difference in the world.

**In one sentence**
-------------------

We are seeking an experienced and strategic FinOps Team Lead to own and scale our Cloud Financial Operations practice across multiple business units and cloud environments. You will lead day‑to‑day cloud financial operations, driving cost optimization, financial accountability, and operational efficiency, while partnering closely with Engineering, Finance, Procurement, and product teams to ensure cloud investments deliver maximum business value.

**What will your job look like?**
---------------------------------

· Team Leadership & Development:

o Manage and mentor a team of FinOps professionals, fostering a culture of collaboration and continuous improvement.

o Define roles, responsibilities, and career development plans for team members.

· Optimization & Task Management:

o Oversee and prioritize optimization initiatives across multiple cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP).

o Ensure timely execution and tracking of cost-saving projects and operational improvements.

· Planning & Governance:

o Build and maintain weekly, monthly, and annual work plans aligned with organizational goals.

o Establish governance frameworks for FinOps processes and ensure compliance with corporate policies.

· Reporting & Transparency:

o Provide clear visibility into savings achieved, task status, and ROI of optimization efforts.

o Develop dashboards and reports for executive leadership and key stakeholders.

· Cross-Functional Collaboration:

o Work closely with technical teams, finance, procurement, and executive leadership to align priorities and drive results.

o Act as the primary liaison between cloud service owners and financial stakeholders.

o Identify opportunities for cost reduction and efficiency improvements.

· POC Leadership & Tool Evaluation:

o Lead Proof of Concept (POC) initiatives for new FinOps tools and technologies.

o Define KPIs for POCs and evaluate candidates for enterprise-wide adoption.

· Process & ROI Communication:

o Clearly articulate the value and ROI of FinOps initiatives to stakeholders.

o Promote FinOps best practices across the organization.

**All you need is...**
----------------------

· 3+ years of experience in cloud financial management, FinOps, or related roles -Must.

· Deep understanding of cloud service structures, pricing models, and cost drivers across AWS, Azure, and GCP -Must.

· Certification in one of the cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) -Must. FinOps Foundation certified – an advantage

· Proven track record of leading teams and delivering measurable cost savings in large-scale environments -Must.

· Bachelor’s degree in finance, Business, Computer Science, or related field (master’s preferred).

· Excellent communication and presentation skills for diverse audiences (technical, financial, executive).

· Strategic thinking with the ability to influence decision-making at senior levels.

· Experience in budgeting, forecasting, and financial modeling for cloud environments - advantage.

· Familiarity with automation tools and scripting for cost optimization.

· Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, matrixed organization with multiple priorities.

**Why you will love this job:**
-------------------------------

* You will work on large challenging and complex programs
* You will be able to work with the best and brightest minds to collaborate across accounts/regions to provide a single voice
* You will have the opportunity to work with the industry most advanced technologies

**[Amdocs is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce](https://www.amdocs.com/sites/default/files/Amdocs-Nondiscrimination-Statement.pdf)**
